message:
fix: correct data_source path and exit code in robot-docs

- Fix data_source reference: .beads/beads.jsonl → .beads/issues.jsonl
  (matches actual file used by datasource package)
- Exit 2 for unknown topic (invalid arguments per documented exit codes)
  instead of silently exiting 0 with error in JSON

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
